ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreadsheet_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spreadsheet type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the spreadsheet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spreadsheet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreadsheets" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spreadsheet */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Internal table name of the spreadsheet */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department owning the spreadsheet */,
  "spreadsheet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spreadsheet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spreadsheet's purpose */,
  "visible_name" TEXT /* User-friendly name for the spreadsheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spreadsheet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spreadsheet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreadsheets_spreadsheet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("spreadsheet_type_id") REFERENCES spreadsheet_types ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreadsheets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreadsheet_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spreadsheet version */,
  "spreadsheet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spreadsheet */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the spreadsheet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreadsheet_versions_spreadsheet_id FOREIGN KEY ("spreadsheet_id") REFERENCES spreadsheets ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreadsheet_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spreadsheet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spreadsheet being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the spreadsheet */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "edit_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has edit permissions */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spreadsheet was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreadsheet_access_spreadsheet_id FOREIGN KEY ("spreadsheet_id") REFERENCES spreadsheets ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreadsheet_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each spreadsheet type
Internal table name of the spreadsheet
ID of the department owning the spreadsheet
Timestamp when the spreadsheet was created
Timestamp when the spreadsheet was last updated
Unique identifier for each spreadsheet version
Description of the changes made in this version
Timestamp when the version was created

Boolean indicating if the user has edit permissions
Timestamp when the spreadsheet was accessed
